CrowFlap.name: Aeroblast
CrowFlap.description: A wind gust that deals 1 damage and 1 Knockback in a line.

CrowFlap2.description: A wind gust that deals 2 damage and 2 Knockback in a line.

CrowFlap3.description: A wind gust that deals 3 damage and 10 Knockback in a line.

ManaBomb.name: Bloom
ManaBomb.description: Give 5 mana to allies in an area.

ManaBomb2.description: Give 5 mana to allies in a large area.

SongOfSpring.name: Song of Spring
SongOfSpring.description: Spawn flower tiles in an area.

SongOfSpring2.description: Spawn flower tiles in a large area.

GrantLife.name: Grant Life
GrantLife.description: Give a unit All Stats Up. You get All Stats Down.

GrantLife2.description: Give a unit All Stats Up, Charge 2, and heal them 2. You get All Stats Down.

SquirrelFurySwipes.name: Squirrel Swipes
SquirrelFurySwipes.description: A melee attack that hits 1-3 times.

SummonSquirrel2.description: Summon a squirrel to any tile.

SummonSnake2.description:
Summon a slippery snake!
(It has a 66% dodge chance.)

SummonTurtle2.description: Summon a turtle to any tile in range 6.

SummonToad2.description:
Summon a super toad!
(It has more damage, health, and can move an extra time each turn)

SummonBear2.description:
Summon a furious bear!
(It has Fury Swipes.)

BattleCry.name: Battle Cry
BattleCry.description: Give all familiars in an area +2 Damage.

BrambleBurst.name: Bramble Burst
BrambleBurst.description: Explode a familiar causing damage to all adjacent units and spawning brambles.

BrambleBurst2.description: Explode a familiar causing damage to all units in range 2 and spawning brambles.

FlowerFeet.name: Flower Feet
FlowerFeet.description: Move 3 tiles. Plant flowers as you move.

FlowerFeet2.description: Move 5 tiles. Plant flowers as you move and where you end up.

ThornyFeet.name: Thorny Feet
ThornyFeet.description: Move 3 tiles. Plant brambles as you move.

ThornyFeet2.description:
Move 3 tiles. Plant brambles as you move.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Encourage.name: Encourage
Encourage.description: Give a familiar an extra turn after this one.

Encourage2.description:
Give a familiar an extra turn after this one.
[s:.7](This spell costs less and has increased range.)[/s]

Protection2.name: Protection
Protection2.description: Give familiars in a large area +1 [img:divineshield].

Promote.name: Promote
Promote.description: The next familiar you spawn becomes a [img:champion] champion.

Promote2.name: Promote
Promote2.description: The next familiar you spawn becomes an [img:elite] elite.

WarCry.name: War Cry
WarCry.description: Each familiar attacks their closest enemy immediately if they can.

WarCry2.description: Your allies and familiars all attack their closest enemy immediately if they can.

TigerForm.name: Form of the Wolf
TigerForm.description: Enter Wolf Form, gaining +2 [img:str], +2 [img:spd], -2 [img:lck], and -2 [img:int]. Your basic attack becomes Wolf Claws and this becomes Pounce.

TigerForm2.description: Enter Wolf Form, gaining +2 [img:str], +2 [img:spd], -2 [img:lck], and -2 [img:int]. Your basic attack becomes Wolf Claws+ and this becomes Pounce+.

TigerSwipes2.description: A 2-hit melee attack that inflicts bleed.

Pounce.name: Pounce
Pounce.description: Jump on a unit, damaging and displacing it.

Pounce2.description: Jump on a unit, damaging, displacing and inflicting Bleed 1 to it.

MonkeyForm.name: Form of the Monkey
MonkeyForm.description: Enter Monkey Form, gaining +2 [img:dex], +2 [img:lck], -2 [img:con], and -2 [img:cha]. Your basic attack becomes Throw Poop and this becomes Monkey Toss.

MonkeyForm2.name: Form of the Monkey
MonkeyForm2.description: Enter Monkey Form, gaining +2 [img:dex] and +2 [img:lck]. Your basic attack becomes Throw Poop and this becomes Monkey Toss+.

MonkeyThrow.name: Monkey Toss
MonkeyThrow.description: Throw an adjacent unit to another tile. It takes damage if it's thrown onto something.

MonkeyThrow2.description:
Throw an adjacent unit to another tile. It takes damage if it's thrown onto something.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

RhinoForm.name: Form of the Turtle
RhinoForm.description: Enter Turtle Form, getting +2 [img:con], +10 [img:shield], -2 [img:int], and -2 [img:spd]. Your basic attack becomes Head Bash and this becomes Harden Shell.

RhinoForm2.name: Form of the Turtle
RhinoForm2.description: Enter Turtle Form, getting +2 [img:con], +10 [img:shield], and -2 [img:int]. Your basic attack becomes Head Bash and this becomes Harden Shell+.

HardenSkin2.description:
Gain +1 [img:shield], +1 Thorns, and +1 temporary Brace.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

HornCharge.name: Head Bash
HornCharge.description: Dash forward one tile, then attack. This attack deals Knockback and has a chance to inflict Stun.

SummonCatepillar.name: Summon Caterpillar
SummonCatepillar.description: Summon a caterpillar. It gains All Stats Up at the end of each turn. It becomes a moth at All Stats Up 5.

SummonCatepillar2.description: Summon a caterpillar with All Stats Up 2. It gains All Stats Up at the end of each turn. It becomes a moth at All Stats Up 5.

CallTheWind.name: Call the Wind
CallTheWind.description: Blow all units back one tile.

CallTheWind2.description:
Blow all units back three tiles.
Allies are immune to knockback damage during this.

InspirationalSong.name: Inspirational Song
InspirationalSong.description: Heal all allies and give them +1 Temporary Damage.

InspirationalSong2.description: Heal all allies and give them +2 Temporary Damage.

DeathMetal.name: Death Metal
DeathMetal.description: A song that explodes a random enemy. If this hits a boss, it instead inflicts Fear.

DeathMetal2.description: A song that explodes a random enemy. If this hits a boss, it instead inflicts Fear. Inflict Madness on each other enemy.

ChaChaSlide.name: Cha Cha Slide
ChaChaSlide.description: Deal 10 Knockback to all units in a random direction. Allies are immune to Thorns, tile and Knockback damage during this effect.

ChaChaSlide2.description: Deal 10 Knockback to all units in a random direction. Allies gain +3 temporary Thorns and are immune to Thorns, tile and Knockback damage during this effect.

BestowWisdom2.description: Give +1 [img:int] and +2 mana to a unit.

RaccoonForm.name: Form of the Raccoon
RaccoonForm.description: Enter Raccoon Form, gaining +2 [img:int], and -2 [img:str]. Your basic attack becomes Pilfer and this becomes Scavenge.

RaccoonForm2.name: Form of the Raccoon
RaccoonForm2.description: Enter Raccoon Form, gaining +2 [img:int], and +2 [img:lck]. Your basic attack becomes Pilfer and this becomes Scavenge+.

Pilfer.name: Pilfer
Pilfer.description: A melee attack that scatters two random pickups when it hits.

Scavenge.name: Scavenge
Scavenge.description: Run to any pickup and collect it.

Scavenge2.description: Run to any pickup and collect it. The effects of that pickup are doubled.

SummonCrow.name: Resummon Crow
SummonCrow.description: Summon a new crow. Castable only if your crow is dead.

WeWillRockYou.name: We Will Rock You
WeWillRockYou.description: Inflict Petrify on a familiar and give it +6 [img:shield].

WeWillRockYou2.description: Inflict Petrify on a familiar and give it +6 [img:shield] and +2 Thorns.

TreeForm.name: Form of the Tree
TreeForm.description: Enter Tree Form, gaining -2 [img:int], +5 [img:shield], and Brace 2. You become immobile and immune to Knockback. Your basic attack becomes Timber and this becomes Synthesize.

TreeForm2.description: Enter Tree Form, gaining -2 [img:int], +5 [img:shield], and Brace 4. You become immobile and immune to Knockback. Your basic attack becomes Timber and this becomes Synthesize+.

Timber.name: Timber
Timber.description: Fall into an adjacent tile, dealing massive damage to units you displace.

Synthesize2.description: You and allies within 3 tiles gain 2 HP and 2 Charge.

HydroPump.name: Hydro Pump
HydroPump.description: Shoot a blast of water that deals 3 Knockback. This spell has recoil.

HydroPump2.description: Shoot a long blast of water that deals 10 Knockback. This spell has recoil.

ControlPlants.name: Control Plants
ControlPlants.description: Create a tall grass tile, then all enemies on grass element tiles take 1 damage.

ControlPlants2.description: Create a tall grass tile, then all enemies on grass element tiles take 1 damage and gain Poison 1.

ControlWater.name: Control Water
ControlWater.description: Create a water tile, then all allies on water element tiles heal 2 HP.

ControlWater2.description: Create a water tile, then all allies on water element tiles heal 2 HP and have their debuffs cleansed.

ControlAir.name: Control Air
ControlAir.description: Blow a unit ten tiles away from you. This doesn't deal Knockback damage.

ControlAir2.description:
Blow a unit ten tiles away from you. This doesn't deal Knockback damage.
[s:.7](This spell costs less and has infinite range.)[/s]

FeralMelee.name: Feral Attack
FeralMelee.description:
A melee attack.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana. Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Entangle2.description: Entangle units in an area and spawn bramble tiles.

Lullaby.name: Lullaby
Lullaby.description: Inflicts Sleep on units in an area.

Lullaby2.description:
Inflicts Sleep on units in an area.
[s:.7](This spell costs less and has increased range.)[/s]

WeAreTheChampions.name: We Are the Champions
WeAreTheChampions.description:
Each familiar gains All Stats Up 2 and heals to full.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

WeAreTheChampions2.description:
Each familiar gains All Stats Up 2 and heals to full.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana. Castable once per battle.)[/s]

Cheerlead.name: Cheerlead
Cheerlead.description:
Make a target unit The Alpha.
PASSIVE: The first spell the Alpha casts each turn is cast twice.

Cheerlead2.description:
Make a target unit The Alpha.
PASSIVE: The first spell the Alpha casts each turn is cast twice.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

NaturesBlessing.name: Nature's Blessing
NaturesBlessing.description: Grow tall grass tiles in an area and give units in that area +3 Diminishing Health Regeneration

NaturesBlessing2.description:
Grow tall grass tiles in an area and give units in that area +3 Diminishing Health Regeneration
[s:.7](This spell costs less and has infinite range.)[/s]

ThrowEgg.name: Throw Egg
ThrowEgg.description: Throw an egg. If the egg lands in an empty tile, it hatches into a random animal friend at the start of its second turn.

ThrowEgg2.description: Throw an egg. If the egg lands in an empty tile, it hatches into a random animal friend at the start of its first turn.

SquirrelForm.name: Form of the Squirrel
SquirrelForm.description:
Spawn squirrels on each adjacent tile, then enter Squirrel Form.
Your basic attack becomes Chitter and this becomes Birth Squirrel.

SquirrelForm2.description:
Spawn squirrels on each adjacent tile, then enter Squirrel Form.
Your basic attack becomes Chitter and this becomes Birth Squirrel+.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

BirthSquirrel.name: Birth Squirrel
BirthSquirrel.description:
Summon a squirrel.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

PlantMushroom.name: Plant Mushroom
PlantMushroom.description: Spawn a glowing mushroom that restores mana to nearby units on its turn.

PlantMushroom2.description: Spawn a glowing mushroom anywhere that restores mana and health to nearby units on its turn.

Serenade.name: Serenade
Serenade.description: Give Health Regeneration 1 to units in an area.

Serenade2.description:
Give Health Regeneration 1 to units in a larger area.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

WindyStep2.description: Give a unit +1 Bonus Move and +1 [img:spd]. They take their next turn earlier.

ElkForm.name: Form of the Elk
ElkForm.description:
Enter Elk Form, gaining +8 [img:spd], -2 [img:int], -2 [img:con], and Trample 3. You ignore tile effects while moving.
Your basic attack becomes Antler Swipe and this becomes Prance.

ElkForm2.name: Form of the Elk
ElkForm2.description:
Enter Elk Form, gaining +8 [img:spd] and Trample 3. You ignore tile effects while moving.
Your basic attack becomes Antler Swipe+ and this becomes Prance+.

AntlerSwipe.name: Antler Swipe
AntlerSwipe.description: Toss a unit up to four tiles away. Inflict Bruise on it and any unit it lands on.

AntlerSwipe2.description: Toss a unit up to four tiles away. Deal damage to and inflict Bruise on it and any unit it lands on.

Prance2.description:
Refresh your movement action.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

MockingbirdForm.name: Form of the Mockingbird
MockingbirdForm.description:
Enter Mockingbird Form, gaining flying movement, +2 [img:lck], and -2 [img:str].
Your basic attack becomes Mock Song and this becomes Tease.

MockingbirdForm2.name: Form of the Mockingbird
MockingbirdForm2.description:
Enter Mockingbird Form, gaining flying movement and +2 [img:lck].
Your basic attack becomes Mock Song+ and this becomes Tease+.

MockSong.name: Mock Song
MockSong.description: Give each unit within an area All Stats Down 2 until the end of their next turn.

MockSong2.name: Mock Song
MockSong2.description: Give enemies within an area All Stats Down 2 (and allies All Stats Up 2) until the the end of their next turn.

Tease2.description: Inflict Madness 1 on a unit. It immediately attacks a unit if it can.

FromTheTrees.name: From the Trees!
FromTheTrees.description: Summon a random animal that falls from the sky onto a random enemy, dealing damage.

FromTheTrees2.description:
Summon a random animal that falls from the sky onto a random enemy, dealing more damage.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]
